description: Together AI is a cloud platform for running, fine-tuning, and deploying AI models, including serverless inference, dedicated endpoints, GPU clusters, and code execution tools. It provides access to open-source and frontier models through its own infrastructure and management tools.
summary: Together AI exposes a documented HTTP API at `https://api.together.ai/v1`, a Python-installed `tg`/`together` CLI, and a docs MCP server mentioned in agent docs; the HTTP API and CLI use Together project API keys.
